summary: Phase 4 comprehensive testing completed. Backend: 93.4% success (71/76 tests passed). Frontend: All Phase 4 features verified working. Fixed critical checkout bug (missing await + db parameter in payment_service call). Yaver chatbot, Settings management, mobile UX, blog enhancements, and product filtering all functional.

critical_bugs.issue: Missing await and db parameter in payment_service.create_checkout_form() call
critical_bugs.fix_details: Changed line 462 in server.py from 'pay = payment_service.create_checkout_form(doc, callback_url)' to 'pay = await payment_service.create_checkout_form(db, doc, callback_url)'

minor_issues.issue: Coupon creation returns 400 'Bu kupon kodu zaten var' when coupons already exist
minor_issues.impact: Test fails on repeated runs, but this is expected behavior (unique constraint)

additional_notes.yaver_chat: Tested with 2 real Mistral large text-only API calls (cheap). Basic chat and product context both working correctly.
additional_notes.settings_api_keys: API keys correctly masked in admin view. Empty PATCH request correctly returns 400. Only provided fields are updated.
additional_notes.mobile_ux: BottomNav, mobile search overlay, and responsive ProductCard all working at 375px viewport.
additional_notes.blog_enhancements: Blog tags, recent posts, and related_product_ids field all functional.
additional_notes.product_filtering: in_stock=true filter working for both /api/products and /api/landing endpoints.
additional_notes.regression: All Phase 1-3 features still working (auth, wishlist, reviews, coupons, blog, checkout after fix).
